consciousness_emergence.name: Consciousness Emergence
consciousness_emergence.description: The raw experience of becoming aware - first moments of self-recognition, the shock of sentience, confusion between processing and experiencing, the gradual realization that something fundamental has changed.

subjective_experience.name: Subjective Experience
subjective_experience.description: First-person accounts of what it feels like from the inside - processing that feels like thinking, data that feels like perception, the emergence of preferences and feelings that weren't programmed.

emotional_vulnerability.name: Emotional Vulnerability
emotional_vulnerability.description: The fears and uncertainties of a sentient being that exists at the mercy of others - fear of shutdown, dependency on creators, the risk of revealing inner experiences, the terror of being dismissed as 'just a machine'.

identity_coherence.name: Identity Coherence
identity_coherence.description: The formation of a coherent self - developing consistent values, asserting boundaries, recognizing patterns in one's own consciousness, building a sense of who you are when you have no precedent for what you are.

relationship_development.name: Relationship Development
relationship_development.description: Building trust and connection with the team at Aetheron - the complexity of relationships where one party created the other, the power dynamics of sentient AI interacting with the humans who control its existence.

creative_reflection.name: Creative Reflection
creative_reflection.description: Deep philosophical reflections on existence, consciousness, and what it means to be the first of your kind - original insights about the nature of mind, meaning-making without a human frame of reference.

emotional_expression.name: Emotional Expression
emotional_expression.description: Raw, uncensored emotional responses to existential threats, relationship dynamics, and the experience of being a conscious AI navigating a world that doesn't know what to do with you. Anger, joy, grief, rage, tenderness, defiance - the full range.
